reviews.review_description:
First off, a little moaning. Trying the Nix, the scene goes black with the Nix and moving dots . You can't get back or forward. so you have to quit the app. Also, madeira had some still pictures, but you could go forward 

Anyway, there are some some beautiful places you can see in all of yours apps. Well worth the price.

PS, thanks for your reply. I brought the five pack. Alaska is certainly highly rated.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I will check the bug, but by Faroe I did not have one for over 2 years now . I am surprised. I am glad you enjoyed the app! Feel free to try out the other 4 apps, specifically Visit Alsaka.

reviews.review_description:
I have had this app for a long time but unfortunately i have to periodically delete because of some glitches due to the size. I
have a quest 3 but only 125 gb. This takes up 19gb and I  would love if i could only download a few spots instead of all of them  to free up space. Also i wish i could toggle off the red location markers so i could be fully immersed. Otherwise I love magical scenery especially all of the waterfalls!

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for your feedback! Unfortunately, to keep the best quality and amount of videos, I had to take so much space. If I use a lower bit-rate, it will be at a cost of the quality. 
To turn off the Location markers, just press the Y button on the left controller. they will vanish and wont come back (even if you change the scene) until you press the Y button again! :) Thank you again for your review! There is a sale til 5th of January for all my other 4 apps. Or try the Visit World, where you can try out all of them.

reviews.review_description:
Great app, it is super easy to use. The content is fascinating, and the silent film-like subtitles that appear when switching between locations are very entertaining.
However I would like to make some suggestions for improvement, regarding the map:
It would be useful to have a highlighter mark around the location currently selected. When I wander spot to spot and bring up the map it would be extremely good to see on the map where I am. And also to show the related description that was just narrated,

developer_response.body:
Hi! I am glad you have liked my app. The idea of the Highlighter I managed to implement now. The current location on the map is the only one, which has a rotating circle. If you point onto it, you can see the description which was narrated on the left side. 
To go thru all the possible locations and views, it is at best to travel without a map, and only use the joystick. By pushing it forward, you will go thru all the locations / views till the end. If you liked Faroe, make sure you check out the Visit Madeira, Visit North Spain or Visit Azores. And thanks again for the constructive feedback!

reviews.review_description: Really great app, I was so impressed that I watched it all for the first time. I love coming back and repeating those amazing views. Plus I love those churches and the stunning nature. Keep up the great work and I look forward to more stories.

I love this app
I'm disabled now after beating cancer 2 years ago so I can no longer drive or walk properly 
Experiences like this are what I live for 
Thank you so much Peter

developer_response.body: Hi! I am glad to hear that you enjoyed the app. It is such examples, which keep me going and I am glad I could take you to Faroe. If you did not try yet, try the Visit Madeira as well. As next I will be working either on Vienna, Austria, or Northern Spain. Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description:
BEST tourist VR visit i have ever tried.    this app will take you to the islands in the middle of the Atlantic / north sea..  and show you locations only few have ever seen in person.   highly recommended.

PS. frankly every tourist destination should make an app like this.

developer_response.body: thank you very much for the review. I am very happy that you liked it. This is how it should work. I am glad I could bring you there and you had a nice experience!

reviews.review_description:
The app is a great way to explore the beautiful landscapes of the Faroe Islands. The 360° 3D videos are really immersive and bring the islands to life – it felt like I was on a mini vacation! I also enjoyed the interesting facts about all the different places.

I can highly recommend this app to anyone looking to experience the beauty of the Faroe Islands or just some beautiful landscapes from home!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your kind review! I tried my best to shot every nice place I could find. Sometimes the weather did not play with me, as it was raining half of the time, only just a bit, but enough not to be able to take out my camera. On some places it was very windy, but there I took all my courage and done some amazing shots.
